name: Coal and Allied Industries Ltd
description: Coal & Allied Industries Limited is an Australia-based coal mining company. The company is engaged in the exploration, development, and production of coal, primarily in the Hunter Valley region of New South Wales. It operates major open-cut coal mines, including Mount Thorley Warkworth, Hunter Valley Operations, and Bengalla, producing high-quality thermal and semi-soft coking coal for export to international markets, particularly in Asia. The company was formerly a subsidiary of Rio Tinto before being acquired by Yancoal Australia.
